message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: Ray on Kubeflow - Asking for user and contributor interest mission (#628)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-6680-ray-on-kubeflow-asking-for-user-and-contributor-interest-comments",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: Ray on Kubeflow - Asking for user and contributor interest / comments",
+    "description": "Ray on Kubeflow - Asking for user and contributor interest / comments. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubeflow deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubeflow version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nhelm list -n kubeflow 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubeflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**Why you need this feature:**\nRay provides a preprocessing, training, tuning and serving framework and a growing number of data scientist are using it i.e. the Ray Community has nearly 5,000 slack members."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ray on Kubeflow - Asking for user and contributor interest",
+        "description": "I have already started a few days ago with the architecture.\nThere are some limitations that need to be mitigated so satisfy the new /contrib requirements merged a few days ago.\n\n1. Enforce Runasnonroot for all images: Remove the root rights from the rayworker according to https://github.com/ray-project/ray/issues/14077#issuecomment-1283208595. I think udocker might be most promising. Most other images should already be compatible.   can you take care of that?\n2. Namespace isolation: We need\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ray on Kubeflow - Asking for user and contributor interest\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I have already started a few days ago with the architecture.\nThere are some limitations that need to be mitigated so satisfy the new /contrib requirements merged a few days ago.\n\n1. Enforce Runasnonroot for all images: Remove the root rights from the rayworker according to https://github.com/ray-project/ray/issues/14077#issuecomment-1283208595. I think udocker might be most promising.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
